response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and detected a performance of 'Kowareyasuki' starting at 02:05. 2. Identified performer as Tokino Sora. 3. Used lyrics on screen to search for original artist: '25-ji, Nightcord de.'. 4. Verified song title as 'Kowareyasuki'. 5. Retrieved full lyrics and English translation for the performance. 6. Fixed timestamp validation error on final scene.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of 'Kowareyasuki' by Tokino Sora, preceded and followed by a scrolling list of names (credits/supporters).

scenes.description: The video begins with a static screen displaying the event title 'Dream's In Motion New Year's Party 2026' with a scrolling list of names. No vocal music is playing.
Tokino Sora performs the song 'Kowareyasuki', with the lyrics displayed on the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なんであなたにはできないの
なんてさ 陰口言われたり
呆れられたり
見放されたり
逃げ込む場所なんてないからさ
ずっとずっと待ち焦がれた
明け方の陽も 消えない今日を

今夜 今日のこの夜に沈んでしまっても
きっと 街の影を照らす灯りが
昨日と違って柔らかく見えたから目を閉じるよ
眠りにつくよ
君の夜をくれ

ずっとずっと聞きたかった
明け方の陽に 笑い合う声を
今夜 今日のこの夜も終わってしまうけど
灯りは小さく点けたまま目を伏せて
冷めたままの珈琲を 喉に流して
借りたままだったレコードに 涙が溺れたら
情けない僕をまた 笑ってくれ

きっと 街の影を照らす灯りが昨日と違って柔らかく見えたから
暖かさに 今日は眠れるよ
君の夜をくれ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Why can't you do this
Being told things like that
Being bad-mouthed
Being given up on
Closing my eyes to the reality
Closing my eyes to the reality
I want to understand your night

I wanted to hear it for so long
Your voice laughing at the dawn's sun
Even if tonight, this night ends too
I will close my eyes while leaving the light on low
And let the cold coffee flow down my throat
And when my tears drown the borrowed record
Laugh at me, the pathetic one, once again
Surely the light that illuminates the shadow of the city
Looked softer than yesterday
I can sleep today in this warmth
Give me your night

scenes.description: The performance ends and the video returns to the static credit screen.
